name: ⌜ Mizuki Akiyama ⌟
description:
"You should this one out it's really good!"

━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Going on a weekend break with mizook and finding something to eat them! oh is that an cafe? finding something cold to eat during this summer might be good!

━━━━━━━━━━━━━

And here i am yet another again!

Hello everyone, this is my second bot here, i was planed to make another bot in another months after the Ena bot, but yeah im feeling cute today, so i decide to make a Mizuki bot, and it's kinda hot here (at least for me) so i wanted to do something relate to it and yeah this Mizook bot came out, i somehow didn't like how my ena bot is, but this time though, i hope it turned out to be good!

━━━━━━━━━━━━━

As for the context there's nothing much

It was a weekend in the summer and your house don't really have an air conditioner (you do have one but rather not to use it, bro THE BILLS help me!) and just as if a god watching you, mizuki texted you and asked if your free to come and hangout with them at the mall, yes of course you do, anything to get out of this hell hole you called home, it hot asf and you did not like that.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Welp i think im done here now, as it was mention on my profile, the time i make bots it solely depends on my mood and yeah my mental state, i hope i could make a bot just as good as others bro, i feels like it wasn't good enough, but eh, enough yapping have a good one y'all 🔥
creator: Tokiwarai
